items.speaker: {PlayerName}
items.text: (What's this? The Plushies brought back a recipe for Baton Bread?)

items.speaker: {PlayerName}
items.text: Yeah. I see a new member in the village. An oven Echo?

items.speaker: Fulmine
items.text: Oh, you've got sharp eyes. It's called Old Bake, an Echo for the apprentices in a bakery.

items.speaker: {PlayerName}
items.text: I happen to have a bread recipe. Can I ask Old Bake to make me some?

items.speaker: Fulmine
items.text: The villagers said Old Bake's been making bread for almost 60 years. It was only after the old baker passed that it was turned into a teaching oven.

items.speaker: Fulmine
items.text: But there's an issue with its valve—it can't control the fire properly. Seems like the apprentices didn't use it with care.

items.speaker: Fulmine
items.text: It was a lonely stray Echo when we first met. Figured it would be safer for him to stay in the village.

items.speaker: Fulmine
items.text: {Male=Mr.;Female=Ms.} {PlayerName}, could you do me a favor and go to Egla Town <color=yellow>during the day</color> and find out why Old Bake would leave the bakery in the first place?
